query:
INSERT INTO `search_analytics` (`query`, `results_count`, `response_time_ms`, `ip_address`, `created_at`) VALUES
('panadol', 15, 45, '192.168.1.1', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)),
('diabetes', 28, 67, '192.168.1.2', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR 45 MINUTE)),
('aspirin', 12, 38, '192.168.1.3', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR 30 MINUTE)),
('panadol actifast', 8, 52, '192.168.1.1', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR 15 MINUTE)),
('hypertension', 35, 89, '192.168.1.4', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)),
('E11', 42, 71, '192.168.1.5', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 45 MINUTE)),
('panadol', 15, 41, '192.168.1.1', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)),
('ibuprofen', 19, 55, '192.168.1.6', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 MINUTE)),
('diabetes', 28, 63, '192.168.1.2', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 MINUTE)),
('fever', 22, 48, '192.168.1.7', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)),
('panadol', 15, 44, '192.168.1.1', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)),
('aspirin', 12, 40, '192.168.1.3', NOW());

INSERT INTO `user_sessions` (`session_id`, `ip_address`, `user_agent`, `last_seen_at`) VALUES
('session_user1', '192.168.1.1', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE)),
('session_user2', '192.168.1.2', 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_0)', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE)),
('session_user3', '192.168.1.3', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7)', NOW()),
('session_user4', '192.168.1.4', 'Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64)', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE)),
('session_user5', '192.168.1.5', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Android 11; Mobile)', NOW());
